source.cookbook: Black Rican Vegan   Fire Plant Based Recipes from
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
COMPRA LIST
1½ cups (360 ml) unsweetened nondairy milk
2 tbsp (30 ml) apple cider vinegar
1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour
2 tbsp (28 g) baking powder
1 tsp salt
⅓ cup (67 g) raw cane sugar
½ cup (110 g) coconut oil, melted
½ cup (118 ml) JUST Egg, for binding
2 tsp (10 ml) pure vanilla extract
1 oz (30 g) vegan Cheddar shreds
⅓ cup (24 g) chopped broccoli
Nonstick oil spray or vegan butter, for waffle maker

Serves 8 to 10
ingredients.original:
COMPRA LIST
1½ cups (360 ml) unsweetened nondairy milk
2 tbsp (30 ml) apple cider vinegar
1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour
2 tbsp (28 g) baking powder
1 tsp salt
⅓ cup (67 g) raw cane sugar
½ cup (110 g) coconut oil, melted
½ cup (118 ml) JUST Egg, for binding
2 tsp (10 ml) pure vanilla extract
1 oz (30 g) vegan Cheddar shreds
⅓ cup (24 g) chopped broccoli
Nonstick oil spray or vegan butter, for waffle maker

Serves 8 to 10

ingredients.item: Turn on your waffle maker and spray it with nonstick oil spray or butter it up with vegan butter. Add about ¾ cup (180 ml) or less of batter, depending on the size of your waffle maker, and let it cook thoroughly. Do not open the waffle maker before the batter cooks all the way through, because it will stick and fall apart. This is important!
